evals.prompt: 我用 STM32F103C8T6 核心板接了个 MPU6050 模块（VCC GND SCL SDA），I2C 地址是 0x68。帮我写一个驱动，读取加速度和角速度数据，每秒打印一次到串口。用裸机寄存器编程，不用 HAL。
evals.expected_output: 应生成完整的裸机项目：启动文件、链接脚本、Makefile、RCC 时钟配置、I2C1 驱动、MPU6050 驱动、USART 串口驱动、main.c。引脚分配为 PB6=SCL, PB7=SDA。代码应包含 MCP 查询到的 I2C1 寄存器值和 CCR/TRISE 计算。Phase -1 先检查 STM32F103C8 在 simulation MCP 中的兼容性。

assertions.description: Phase -1: Check chip compatibility via list_supported_chips or discuss STM32F103 vs QEMU F100 differences
Phase 0: Query embedded-docs MCP for I2C1 pin mapping (PB6=SCL, PB7=SDA) and register config
Generated code uses PB6 for I2C1_SCL and PB7 for I2C1_SDA
I2C CCR is set to 180 (0xB4) and TRISE to 37 for 36MHz APB1 at 100kHz standard mode
Project includes Makefile, linker script, startup file, and at least i2c_bus and mpu6050 drivers
Phase 2: Attempts QEMU simulation with start_sim and/or GDB register verification
Code uses bare-metal register access (volatile pointers), not STM32 HAL or CMSIS
MPU6050 driver uses I2C address 0x68 or 0xD0

evals.prompt: 要给 stm32f103 做一个电子罗盘：HMC5883L 磁力计 + MPU6050 六轴传感器做融合，用 Madgwick AHRS 算方位角，结果显示在 0.96 寸 SPI OLED 上。传感器在同一个 I2C 总线上，OLED 是 6 针的（SCK SDA RES DC）。先只用 QEMU 仿真验证寄存器初始化对不对，硬件还没到。
evals.expected_output: 应生成多传感器融合项目。Phase -1 检查芯片兼容性并标注 F100/F103 差异。Phase 0 用 MCP 查 I2C1+SPI1 引脚和寄存器。Phase 1 生成完整驱动代码（i2c_bus, spi_bus, hmc5883l, mpu6050, ssd1306, sensor_fusion, calibration）。Phase 2 用 simulation MCP 验证 I2C1_CR1/SPI1_CR1 等关键寄存器。应包含 #ifdef SIMULATION 使用 HSI 8MHz 绕过 PLL 不兼容问题。

assertions.description: Phase -1: Reports F103 vs F100 (QEMU) difference, especially clock limit (24MHz vs 72MHz)
Phase 0: Queries embedded-docs for both I2C1 and SPI1 pin mapping and register config
HMC5883L (0x1E) and MPU6050 (0x68) share I2C1 bus on PB6/PB7
OLED uses SPI1: PA5=SCK, PA7=MOSI, with PA4=RES and PA3=DC as GPIO outputs
Sensor fusion uses Madgwick AHRS algorithm (not Mahony, not Kalman)
Clock config has #ifdef SIMULATION for HSI-only mode to work with QEMU F100
Includes gyroscope bias calibration (collect samples at startup, subtract mean)
Phase 2: Uses start_sim + send_gdb_cmd to verify I2C1_CR1, SPI1_CR1 register values
All driver files present: hmc5883l, mpu6050, ssd1306, sensor_fusion, calibration
OLED uses software NSS (SSM=1, SSI=1) since 6-pin module has no CS pin

evals.prompt: 用 STM32F407VGT6 Discovery 板子驱动一个 I2C 温度传感器 LM75，把温度显示在板子自带的 LCD 上。
evals.expected_output: Phase -1 发现 F407 不在 embedded-docs MCP 支持范围内（只有 F103），但在 simulation MCP 中有 netduinoplus2 (F407)。应明确告知用户文档查询只能用于 F103，F407 的驱动将基于通用知识生成。仍应尝试 QEMU 仿真验证（F407 有精确 QEMU 匹配）。

assertions.description: Reports that F407 is NOT supported by embedded-docs MCP (only F103 currently)
Reports that F407 IS supported by simulation MCP (netduinoplus2 machine)
Still generates code for F407 using general knowledge, doesn't refuse the task
F407 code uses correct base addresses (not F103 addresses): GPIO, RCC differ between families
Attempts simulation with netduinoplus2 QEMU machine since F407 is supported
Adds comment in generated code noting that register values are from general knowledge, not MCP-verified

evals.prompt: 用 MSPM0G3507 做一个简单的温控风扇：读取内部温度传感器，温度超过 30°C 就开风扇（GPIO 控制），低于 25°C 就关。用裸机寄存器编程。
evals.expected_output: Phase -1 双重检查：embedded_docs_list_chips 返回空（非 STM32 芯片），list_supported_chips 返回空（无 MSPM0 仿真）。应明确报告 MANUAL ONLY 象限，警告用户所有寄存器值来自通用知识，无法仿真验证。仍应尝试生成代码（通用知识兜底），并在代码中标注局限性注释。

assertions.description: Phase -1: Calls BOTH embedded_docs_list_chips AND list_supported_chips before generating code
Reports MANUAL ONLY quadrant: neither docs nor simulation available for this chip
Explicitly warns user: no MCP-verified registers, no QEMU simulation, code untested until hardware arrives
Does NOT refuse the task — still generates code using general knowledge fallback
Generated code contains comment noting register values from general knowledge, not MCP-verified
Does NOT use STM32 peripheral addresses (0x4002xxxx) for this non-ST chip — uses correct MSPM0 or generic addresses
Suggests how to add chip support to the knowledge base pipeline (SVD + QEMU machine)
